events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: George Michael, the iconic singer-songwriter, was born on June 25, 1963, and would have turned 63 today. He tragically passed away on Christmas Day in 2016.

angles.name: Remembering a legend
angles.copy: Today, we're remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63. From Wham! to his phenomenal solo career, his music defined an era. What's your favourite George Michael track?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson passed away
events.blurb: June 25, 2026, marks 17 years since the 'King of Pop,' Michael Jackson, died at the age of 50 in Los Angeles.

angles.name: King of Pop's Legacy
angles.copy: It's 17 years today since we lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music continues to move generations. Which of his songs still gives you chills?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today, born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo!
angles.copy: Peace and love to Ringo Starr, who turns 86 today! From the Beatles to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm is unmistakable. What's your top Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today, born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Sir Brian May! Guitar hero, songwriter, and astrophysicist – is there anything he can't do? What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The energy, the stage presence – the man is a legend! What's your favourite Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV officially launched, forever changing the music industry, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video aired.

angles.name: The Day The Music Changed
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, a new channel launched that changed music forever: MTV! And the first video? A true classic. What was your favourite music video back in the day?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became the fastest-selling debut album in British history at the time.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: 22 years ago today, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your standout track from this legendary debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15 to 18, 1969, attracting over 400,000 people.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, Woodstock kicked off three days of peace, love, and music that became a cultural phenomenon. If you could have been there, who would you have wanted to see?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: August 16, 2026, marks 49 years since the 'King of Rock and Roll,' Elvis Presley, passed away at his Graceland estate at the age of 42.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, 49 years since we lost the King of Rock and Roll. His impact is still felt across music. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur passed away 30 years ago
events.blurb: American rapper Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, in Las Vegas, six days after being critically wounded in a drive-by shooting.

angles.name: Remembering a Rap Icon
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the music world lost a true icon: Tupac Shakur. His lyrics and legacy still resonate. What's your go-to Tupac anthem?

events.title: Jimi Hendrix passed away 56 years ago
events.blurb: September 18, 2026, marks 56 years since the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix died in London at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Legend's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His guitar playing changed everything. What's your favourite Jimi Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road,' in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Walk Across History
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' – an album and a cover that became instantly legendary. What's your favourite track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today, born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude have inspired generations. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a celebrated solo artist, celebrates his 54th birthday today, born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad for it Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! From Oasis anthems to his solo hits, he's still got it. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single released in the UK in 1975
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in 1975, four years after its initial US single release and the album's debut.

angles.name: Imagine a World
angles.copy: On this day in 1975, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK. Its message of peace and unity still resonates. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how people carried and listened to their music with '1,000 songs in your pocket.'

angles.name: The Pocket Revolution
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod was unveiled 25 years ago today? It changed music consumption forever! How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No,' in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, 007 always delivers. What's your favourite Bond film or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, the legendary co-founder of The Beatles, was born on October 9, 1940, and would have turned 86 today. He was tragically killed in 1980.

angles.name: Remembering a Visionary
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're remembering the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?
